item.title: Version 1.0.9
item.description:
Graphoris 1.0.9

  • PNG export — default DPI raised 150 → 400 (publication quality)
  • Export aliasing fix — Metal fast-path skipped during PNG/PDF/EPS/clipboard export
  • Independent line-opacity slider in the Line color row
  • Invert toggle on the 2D color palette (parity with heatmap and 3D)
  • Font-size sliders widened to 4–96 across the chart inspector
  • Axis Range auto-formats with %.3g on log scales and tiny/huge bounds
  • PLOTS list drag-and-drop reorder with insertion-line indicator
  • Multi-dataset drag order from the sidebar matches visible order
  • Color palettes expanded 18 → 47 (matplotlib + seaborn)

item.title: Version 1.0.8
item.description:
Graphoris 1.0.8

  • Box plot — six user-selectable whisker modes
  • CSV import — auto-detect header-less files
  • Add Plot popover — 3D-aware with data source picker
  • Performance — smooth canvas zoom, eliminated idle redraws
  • Heatmap — hex cell shape (odd-r pointy-top)
  • Fix — sidebar reactivity, 3D categorical axes, JSON preview scroll

item.title: Version 1.0.7
item.description:
Graphoris 1.0.7 — Heatmap Layout

  • Color bar axis controls — position, ticks, and label decimals
  • Heatmap label decimals — configure decimal places for cell value labels
  • Unified layout engine — heatmap, color bar, and axis titles computed together; no overlaps
  • Fix: right Y-axis title positioned correctly after tick labels
  • Fix: color bar X positioning and cell label threshold

item.title: Version 1.0.6
item.description:
Graphoris 1.0.6 — 3D Inspector

  • Fill toggle for 3D surfaces — enable/disable independently from wireframe
  • Wireframe color — manual color or Auto (per-face palette color, darkened)
  • Open markers — hollow marker option for 3D scatter plots
  • Unified color scheme — heatmap and 3D share the same color range controls
  • Color range row clears min/max independently; wand resets both
  • Perf: opacity and lighting skip geometry rebuild — uniform-only update at full fps
  • Fix: Y column picker shows all columns; Z stays numeric-only
  • Fix: decimal +/- buttons clickable on full area

item.title: Version 1.0.5
item.description:
Graphoris 1.0.5 — Table Engine

  • Spreadsheet-style keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Tab, type-to-overwrite)
  • Auto-fill with pattern detection — drag handle continues linear/geometric patterns
  • Generate Series — linear, logarithmic, power, random uniform/normal
  • Expression-based computed columns with Col(A) and quoted name references
  • Command palette table commands with keyboard arrow navigation
  • Real data splitting — child data sources in project navigator
  • Multi-cell operations: paste TSV, fill down, clear selection
  • Column metadata: unit/comment fields with CSV auto-detection
  • UI polish: thicker material, white active tool icons

item.title: Version 1.0.4
item.description:
Graphoris 1.0.4

  • Fix: restore active-state highlight on canvas header
  • Fix: save dialog loop and table reactivity issues
  • Fix: 3D marker size rendering bug
  • Fix: data table dark mode and multi-row delete
  • Feat: JSON file importer with smart nested data extraction
  • Feat: NSTableView-based data table for improved performance
  • Feat: support dropdown with Discord link

item.title: Version 1.0.3
item.description:
Graphoris 1.0.3

  • Polar free trial update
  • Fix: walkthrough overlay highlight rect alignment
  • Fix: clear selection before deleting project items to prevent frozen panels
  • Fix: sidebar reactivity (layers, project navigator, bindings)
  • Style: remove build number from settings window

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
Graphoris 1.0.1 — Hot Fix

  • Fix: sidebar/inspector toggle button causing UI hang

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
Graphoris 1.0.0

  • Scientific charting: scatter, line, bar, area, histogram, box plot, heatmap, violin
  • Canvas with shapes, connectors, groups, layers
  • AI chat with 62+ tools, smart Haiku/Sonnet routing
  • 3D charts (scatter, surface, bar) with Metal rendering
  • Compute engine: fitting, FFT, peak detection, statistics
  • Custom scripted plots (Python + DSL)
  • PDF/SVG/PNG/EPS export
  • MCP server integration
